basic_details.job_title: Lakshadweep Administration Lecturer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Lakshadweep Administration has officially released a notification for the recruitment of Lecturer in Mechanical Engineering Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for education jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B. Tech./B.S. in relevant discipline with First Class or equivalent. Master's Degree or Ph.D. in relevant subject and experience as Lecturer are desirable.
qualification.details: B.E./B. Tech./B.S. in relevant discipline with First Class or equivalent. Master's Degree in relevant disciplines with First Class or equivalent/ Ph.D. in relevant subject (Desirable) Experience as Lecturer in relevant subject in Govt. Recognized Polytechnic College (Desirable)

selection_process: Merit panel preparation based on qualifications and interview Online/Offline interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Lakshadweep Administration Lecturer in Mechanical Engineering Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Lakshadweep Administration Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Lakshadweep Administration Lecturer in Mechanical Engineering Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Lakshadweep Administration Lecturer in Mechanical Engineering Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Lakshadweep Administration Lecturer in Mechanical Engineering Recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications is 07-08-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Lecturer in Mechanical Engineering post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E./B. Tech./B.S. in Mechanical Engineering with First Class or equivalent. A Master's Degree or Ph.D. in the relevant subject and prior experience as a Lecturer are considered desirable qualifications.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Lecturer in Mechanical Engineering position is 60 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Lecturer in Mechanical Engineering position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated monthly salary of Rs 30,000/-. This is a contractual engagement.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Lakshadweep Administration Lecturer in Mechanical Engineering Recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it with the required details, attach necessary documents, and send it by post to the Principal, Government Polytechnic College, Minicoy, Lakshadweep, Pin-682559.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive. Candidates can proceed with their application without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Lecturer in Mechanical Engineering role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve the preparation of a merit panel based on the candidate's qualifications and performance in an interview. Both online and offline interview modes may be used.

faq.question: Q8. What documents need to be submitted along with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to submit self-attested copies of all relevant certificates, including educational qualifications, experience certificates (if any), and identity proof, along with the application form.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can typically be downloaded from the official website of the Lakshadweep Administration or the Directorate of Education. Specific links will be provided in the "Important Links" section.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The engagement for the Lecturer in Mechanical Engineering post is on a contractual basis. This means the position is temporary and for a defined period.
